query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A figure in deep red and black clothing appears mid-stride or mid-leap against a stark white background, limbs extended in a dynamic diagonal pose, with secondary blue and purple tones visible near the legs and lower body.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A figure rendered in aggressive motion blur streaks diagonally across a white void, the body dissolving into smeared red, black, blue and purple color fields where clashing warm and cool tones collide without blending; the intentional blur obliterates facial features and anatomical detail, rendering the subject as an abstract kinetic gesture rather than a recognizable human form.
